creator: wpaul@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


This is not a proper problem report. You aren't running the latest release 
of FreeBSD and/or the latest xl driver, and you don't say what kind of  
hardware you have other than the fact that you have a 3c905B card. If you  
think that "Use Linux or Windows" is the proper fix for this, then go 
ahead and use them and leave us alone. 

Go try FreeBSD 3.2-RELEASE, or download the latest driver from 
http://www.freebsd.org/~wpaul/3Com/3.0. If you still have problems, 
submit another problem report because I am closing this one.
